title: Optional Modules
subtitle: Expand Loquia's capabilities with specialized addons

diagnostics.name: Professional Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Provides structured intelligence for planning, benchmarking, and opportunity detection with comprehensive market data.
diagnostics.tagline: Elevate your diagnostics with market intelligence.
diagnostics.for_who: For agencies, specialists and companies that want to elevate their diagnostics.

calls.name: Automated Lead Qualification Calls
calls.description: Automated qualification calls with flexible scripts, response capture, automatic scoring, ready-to-use reporting and smart scheduling.
calls.for_who: For those who need to scale and standardize lead qualification.

how_it_works.title: How Addons Work
how_it_works.subtitle: Optional modules you can add to any plan

steps.title: Choose your base plan
steps.description: Select the Loquia plan that best fits your needs.

steps.title: Add desired modules
steps.description: Choose the addons that complement your operation.

steps.title: Pay only for what you use
steps.description: Addons are billed monthly along with your plan.

compatibility.title: Compatibility
compatibility.description: All addons are compatible with any Loquia plan, from Starter to Premium.
compatibility.note: You can add or remove addons at any time.
